notes: zarr v3 reads v2-format stores transparently; the captured level-5 chunks decode through blosc/zstd via numcodecs. Persisted footprint is ~3.4 MB (4 compressed chunks + Zarr metadata). Runtime memory peaks under 200 MB when sampling a 50x30x50 voxel block. Levels 0-4 of the multiscale pyramid are NOT persisted — those would balloon to GBs and exceed the resource budget.
